summary: This page introduces the exponential signal e^{st} as a fundamental model in signals and systems, where the complex frequency s = \sigma + j\omega combines exponential growth/decay and sinusoidal oscillation. It derives expressions relating e^{st} and its complex conjugate to exponentially weighted sinusoids, and identifies constants, real exponentials, sinusoids, and exponentially varying sinusoids as special cases. The page also references graphical interpretation in Fig. 1.21 and introduces the complex frequency plane.

figures.caption: Fig. 1.21 Sinusoids of complex frequency σ + jω.
